© Swisscows AG, 2025

© Swisscows AG, 2025

To be able to offer the free search at all, advertising from external providers is strictly necessary.
Swisscows itself does not store user data and does not create user profiles.
However, the integration of advertising partners may result in data flows to third-party providers over which Swisscows has no control.

Anyone who wants to search completely independently of external advertising and with maximum anonymity can choose the Swisscows subscription: ad-free, no data storage, and no sharing of search queries – for 100% privacy.

Swisscows Pro
